channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Light hanging off of the top of lamp post, 12th May
item.description:
The light is hanging off of the lamp post and is a serious danger and could fall on someone
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Crescent, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: X of graffiti along Stockwell main road SW9. The graffiti is mainly on walls, bus stop shelters and street boxes., 11th May
item.description:
Unfortunately there has a surge of graffiti along Stockwell main road SW9. The graffiti is most visible on the walls, bus stop shelters and street boxes. As I mentioned it is on the full stretch of road and is very visible. The graffiti has been there for a little over two weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnley Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Defaced parking restriction sign, 11th May
item.description:
Opposite 25 Combermere rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Defaced parking restriction sign, 11th May
item.description:
Outside 27 Combermere rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 59 Gloucester Crescent, 11th May
item.description:
Street light not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Gloucester Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all around bin area, 11th May
item.description:
Litter in playground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bailes Place, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 38 Howitt Road, 11th May
item.description:
Street light not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Howitt Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unacceptable litter strewn street., 11th May
item.description:
As a resident of Marmont Rd, I would like to point out that it has been months now since our street has been swept. Apparently on the 6th May a resident reported the above issued. He/She received a notice on the 7th of May to say the street has been cleaned so the case is closed. The street is still unswept , so for Southwark to claim that the problem has been rectified it is so NOT TRUE.. We as residents deserves better , we would appreciate it very much if Southwark could ensure that our street is kept clean. We care about our street , so, I don't think that we are asking for too much. Many thanks!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal wire sticking out of pavement, 11th May
item.description:
The metal wire is sticking out of the pavement and has punctured my tyre twice when reversing out of my driveway. It is also a potential trip hazard for pedestrians and a hazard for dogs or anyone walking in sandals. The cement is deteriorating around it and crumbling away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous fly tipping, 11th May
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping. It’s like this every week. CCTV needed, it’s getting worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yalding Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes and poor road surface, 11th May
item.description:
Multiple pot holes and poor road surface along this stretch of road, please arrange to inspect and repair. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northend Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 11th May
item.description:
A filthy mattress has been dumped on the pavement outside 389 Westmount Rd. First noticed it today 11th May 2026.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaning against tree in Front Garden, 11th May
item.description:
Flytipping again. Needs to be removed before other ppl follow suit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Park, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White parking lines, 11th May
item.description:
The white lines defining where you can park on the pavements are very faded and in some places almost invisible, this makes it hard to know if you are parked correctly. We have an increasing amount of traffic wardens patrolling this street, so in order not to get a parking ticket, these lines need to be repainted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Methuen Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking every day, 11th May
item.description:
Ilegally parks cars here all day most week days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lamb Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dog has fowled the footpath, 11th May
item.description:
Outside 15 & 13 Seward rd, a large fog has fowled the pavement. I have tried to clear it away but it’s not been possible. Children walk through this road to go to school. It’s a health hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seward Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes growing over bike path, 11th May
item.description:
Bushes growing over the cycle path that is part of National Cycle Network Route 425. Big enough to be a hazard if two bikes were coming in opposite directions - restricted visibility and restricted space to pass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerfield Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning, 11th May
item.description:
How often are the streets cleaned? Laurel Street is always dirty! We want a clean borough!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire access and driveway blocked, 11th May
item.description:
Emergency entrance and driveway blocked with double yellow blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: See map, 11th May
item.description:
Fly tipped wood thing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Torbay Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
